title: Scuffed Block Placing
description: When placing a block, it randomly places it in a 5x5x1 cube.
body:
![bg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97c3837d39220576e38c78af26cf5c1ca45a51c7.png)
# IT'S IN THE NAME
**Random block placing!!!**

i've seen this done so many times, yet i have not been able to find a single public mod doing it, so i made it myself (that's almost always why i make mods).
![showcase](https://i.imgur.com/9qMCUPA.gif)
